---
title: "Analysis"
format: html
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dashboardr::.page_config(accessibility = TRUE, crosstab_prefix = "analysis")
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Load dashboardr (includes dplyr, highcharter as dependencies)
library(dashboardr)

# Global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Load data
data <- readRDS('dataset_small_32obs.rds')

# Data summary
cat('Dataset loaded:', nrow(data), 'rows,', ncol(data), 'columns\n')

```

## overview


::: {.panel-tabset}

### Cylinders

```{r overview}
# Cylinders
result <- viz_bar(
  data = data,
  title = "Cylinders",
  x_var = "cyl_label"
)

result
```


### Gears

```{r overview-2}
# Gears
result <- viz_bar(
  data = data,
  title = "Gears",
  x_var = "gear"
)

result
```


:::
